name: CNNC Hua Yuan Titanium Dioxide Co., Ltd
summary: CNNC Hua Yuan Titanium Dioxide Co., Ltd engages in the production, marketing, and service of titanium dioxide powder in China and internationally. Its products are used in the coating, printing ink, d√É¬©cor paper/laminate, and plastic industries. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Wuxi, China.
